prompt: ICM blocker setup: tap left hole card (As).
why_v1: Hole-card anchor keeps hand reference stable before ICM action.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. As is the hole-card anchor, so the tournament read stays tied to the blocker cue that changes how much pressure your hand can carry.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. The ace of spades is the target hole card because that blocker is the hand reference that sharpens the ICM decision.
